creator: jktheowl@bga.com
text:
Document covers installation of NIS in a simple environment of
server and several clients. It seeks to integrate several sources,
such as Hal Stern's book and the man pages. The html version has
a reference to Ted Wisniewski's tutorial as well.

The file can be found in the incoming directory as nistutorial.tar.gz
and contains an html version (viewable on line at:

		www.realtime.net/sculpture/nis-startup.html )

and an sgml version (first attempt at that) which may need some work.

Fix: 

.
